response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar with 15+ years across web, mobile, and backend systems, deep TypeScript/Node.js expertise, and current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work — a rare and explicitly required skill. They demonstrate strong engineering culture (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing libraries they authored) plus cloud, Docker/Kubernetes, and database experience. The main gaps are no stated Nest.js experience, a frontend history weighted toward Ember.js rather than React, and no Kotlin or Python exposure, but the breadth and craftsmanship suggest these are learnable quickly.
strengths: Current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure experience, directly matching a required skill
Deep TypeScript/Node.js fullstack background with AWS, MongoDB, Docker, and Kubernetes
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, open-source authorship, and teaching/workshop experience
concerns: No stated Nest.js experience, a core framework in the primary stack
Frontend experience is mostly Ember.js; React exposure appears limited to one role
Kotlin and Python proficiency not evidenced; Java experience appears dated

key_factors.factor: TypeScript/Node.js fullstack depth and years of experience
Limited React/Nest.js evidence in primary stack
